query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_data, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_nonzero_loss, MAX(expectedAnnualLoss) as max_loss, AVG(expectedAnnualLoss) as avg_loss FROM supplyChainRisks
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_records, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as with_data, COUNT(CASE WHEN expectedAnnualLoss > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_nonzero_loss, MAX(expectedAnnualLoss) as max_loss, AVG(expectedAnnualLoss) as avg_loss FROM supplyChainRisks
